title: begonia somervillei
intro: Begonia somervillei, also known as the Somerville Begonia, is a species of flowering plant in the family Begoniaceae. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to treat fever and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Begonia somervillei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and protect against infections. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and its herbal preparations are also used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
